title: Champion Hoodie — Red
image_captions: Red Champion hoodie with white script logo on chest. No measurements, tags, or flaws visible.
Red Champion hoodie with white script logo on chest. No measurements, tags, or flaws visible.
Red Champion hoodie front detail showing white script logo reading 'Cham' on chest.
Detail shot showing red Champion sweatshirt sleeve cuff with white 'C' logo on the wrist area.
Neck tag reading Champion Size LARGE YRS.11/12 CM.150/155 MADE IN CAMBODIA FABRIQUE AU CAMBOGE HECHO EN CAMBOYA
Vertical tape measure showing 58cm at the hem edge of red fabric.
Horizontal tape measure showing 40cm at the edge of red fabric.
enhanced_description:
Champion Youth Hoodie — Red
Brand: Champion
Size: Youth Large (11/12 Yrs)
Condition: Like New
Composition: 58% Cotton, 42% Polyester
Color: Red

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 40cm
Length: 58cm

About the Piece
A vibrant red Champion hoodie perfect for keeping cool and looking sharp. This piece features a classic white script logo on the chest, offering a timeless look that stands out in any crowd.

Style Note: Sporty Streetwear / Retro Athleisure

Key Detail: Authentic white 'C' logo sleeve cuff with matching chest branding.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Champion items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
